llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by applying the Denver Broncos color palette and updating the site branding to CoFirstTimeBuyerGrants.

risks: app/globals.css: Potential layout issues due to color changes affecting visibility.
app/layout.tsx: Metadata changes might affect SEO or site indexing.
components/site-footer.tsx: Placeholder contact information could lead to user confusion.

llm_analysis.notes: The changes are primarily related to styling and branding, so typical input edge cases are not applicable.
No API or schema changes are involved, so no migration is needed.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Consider adding visual regression tests to ensure the new color scheme is applied consistently.
